name: hackernews-frontpage
tagline: Scrapes the Hacker News front page and returns the top 30 stories as JSON.
verdict: This skill provides a clear, well-defined function with stable HTML parsing. It serves as a good reference skill due to its simplicity and deterministic output, making it easy to test and maintain. The skill's description is clear, and its output contract is well-defined.

highlights.summary: The skill does not explicitly state when NOT to use it or any out-of-scope cases.
